channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: U.S., Iran signal peace progress — but remain at odds over enriched uranium, Strait of Hormuz tolls
item.description: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday said there were "good signs" that an agreement to end the Middle East conflict is in sight.

item.title: Stock futures rise as S&P 500 looks toward another winning week: Live updates
item.description: Volatility picked up this week as investors wrestled with a sharp rise in long-term Treasury yields.

item.title: IMAX has held ‘preliminary talks’ with potential buyers, source says
item.description: IMAX has held "preliminary talks" through intermediaries, but no official pitches have been made directly by the company, a source told CNBC.

item.title: Anthropic, Microsoft in talks for AI chip deal after $5 billion investment
item.description: Microsoft has not made the Maia 200 chips available to customers, but they are used in the company's data centers, offering better efficiency than other silicon.

item.title: BCA says the stock and bond markets 'are on a collision course.' And bonds may win
item.description: Bond investors may come out on top as equity and Treasury markets head for a collision.

item.title: Eli Lilly says next-generation weight loss drug clears crucial obesity trial
item.description: The results bring Lilly one step closer to filing for approval of the injection, retatrutide, which works differently from existing injections and pills.

item.title: SpaceX scrubs test flight of massive Starship rocket, will retry Friday
item.description: SpaceX's attempted Starship launch follows the company's release of its IPO prospectus, which set the stage for what's likely to be a record offering.

item.title: Workday jumps 14% as it bumps up margin forecast on AI strength
item.description: Workday's CEO says the company is seeing success in artificial intelligence.

item.title: Guzman y Gomez shares surge as much as 20% after fast-food chain says it will exit U.S. market
item.description: Guzman y Gomez's shares surged after announcing that it has decided to exit the U.S. market while keeping its Australian business as the main focus

item.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani launches Twitch show to answer New Yorkers' questions
item.description: The livestream series will let New Yorkers question Mamdani in real time on Twitch, expanding beyond the early echoes of FDR's fireside chats.

item.title: The Cuba situation is starting to resemble a pre-conflict playbook
item.description: The U.S. pressure campaign against Cuba appears to have entered a new phase.

item.title: Crypto bros, scalpers and Logan Paul: Inside the world of Pokémon where cards are sold for millions
item.description: A Pokémon card boom is being driven by nostalgia, blockbuster card sales and speculation.

item.title: Miner Perpetua Resources secures $2.9 billion U.S. loan for Idaho gold, antimony project
item.description: Mining company Perpetua Resources has secured a $2.9 billion loan from the U.S. Export-Import Bank as the U.S. looks to secure access to critical minerals.

item.title: How Fanatics cornered the sports collectibles market
item.description: As FIFA's exclusive collectibles licensee, Fanatics is set to tap a rapidly growing market in the world's largest sport, but longstanding criticisms follow.

item.title: Meta, Broadcom and others to launch $125 million semiconductor research hub at UCLA
item.description: Broadcom, Meta, Applied Materials, GlobalFoundries and Synopsys are joining forces to launch a $125 million "Semiconductor Hub" at UCLA.

item.title: SoftBank Group adds over $61 billion to market cap in two days as shares surge on AI led optimism
item.description: Shares of SoftBank Group extended gains for a second straight session Friday.

item.title: Job training for robots: How China is getting machines ready to join the workforce
item.description: Tesla CEO Elon Musk said on the company's fourth-quarter earnings call that China is the biggest competition for humanoid robots.

item.title: Bond yields have been surging. How income-hungry investors can cash in
item.description: A jump in Treasury yields rattled the bond market this week, but the volatility comes with a silver lining for income-seeking investors.

item.title: Trump administration says new EPA rules will save you money at the supermarket. It's not clear they will
item.description: Trump delayed Biden-era EPA refrigerant rules, saying the move will lower grocery costs, though the impact on food prices remains unclear.

item.title: How Walmart's gas price warning shapes our retail outlook — plus, Honeywell's quantum connection
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: China calls for APEC cooperation as commerce minister skips opening over ‘urgent official business’
item.description: China's international trade representative Li Chenggang said he was chairing Friday's meeting as Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had urgent matters to attend to.

item.title: Now is the best time to open a gas credit card: Earn up to 15 cents off per gallon or 3X rewards on fuel
item.description: With gas prices rising by over 50% since the end of February, CNBC covers some top co-branded gas cards, as well as more general options.

item.title: Lenovo shares jump nearly 20% on record earnings as AI revenue nearly doubles
item.description: Shares of Lenovo surged over 15% on Friday, after the electronics giant posted strong revenue growth bolstered by its artificial intelligence business.

item.title: Trump postpones AI executive order signing: 'I didn't like certain aspects'
item.description: Trump said that AI is "causing tremendous good," and he was concerned that the executive order "could have been a blocker."

item.title: AI spending expected to top $1 trillion in 2 years. That estimate's way too low if Jensen Huang's right
item.description: "The capex is at a trillion dollars, and it's growing toward the three to four [trillion-dollar mark]," said Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang.

item.title: Airlines are struggling but China's 'Big Three' face a tougher year than most
item.description: China's carriers face sky-high jet fuel, lack of hedging strategies, and a customer base that can easily pivot to cheaper high-speed rail services.

item.title: Indian telecom major Bharti Airtel is doubling down on Africa venture, UK's BT
item.description: Indian telecom giant Bharti Airtel is raising its stake in British and African ventures as it hunts for growth overseas

item.title: Japan core inflation softens to over four year low, weakening case for BOJ rate hike
item.description: Core inflation — which strips out prices of fresh food — was lower than the 1.7% expected by economists polled by Reuters and below the 1.8% reading in March.

item.title: McConnell calls DOJ Trump fund 'utterly stupid, morally wrong' after Blanche meeting
item.description: Critics of the "Anti-Weaponization Fund" fear it will give money to Trump supporters who attacked police defending the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021.

item.title: 2-time NASCAR champion Kyle Busch has died at 41, NASCAR says
item.description: Kyle Busch, a two-time Cup Series champion who won more races than anyone across NASCAR's three national series, has died at 41.
